hypothesis: If the six operating parameters (bicarbonate temperature, bicarbonate concentration, cathode-side flow rate, anode-side flow rate, KOH concentration, and total applied current density) are optimized by closed-loop Bayesian optimization during 5-minute electrolysis runs with silver nanoparticle–coated gas-diffusion electrodes, then the reactor yield will be maximized within the tested domain because the optimization will converge on high-yield regions and SHAP analysis will identify current density and bicarbonate concentration as the most influential factors.
